summary: Tested P1 features: Post-event rating flow (Dashboard) and Private Lead Notes (Profile). All 21 backend tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass. Full end-to-end flow verified: gig creation → invite → accept → handover → completed → pending ratings banner → rating modal → submission → banner cleared. Notes CRUD with privacy enforcement all working.

issues: Minor UX: React controlled range inputs require React synthetic events. Playwright test automation needs JS evaluate workaround to set slider values programmatically. For actual users, sliders work fine via drag/click - no real issue.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: RatingSubmit model has `notes` field (private note in rating) which stores notes per-rating, but Profile.jsx private notes (lead_notes collection) is a separate distinct feature. These are two different notes systems — one per-gig rating note, one persistent notes per person — which is fine but E1 should document the distinction clearly.
The admin bulk-action endpoint is at /api/admin/users/bulk-action NOT /api/admin/bulk-action. The prefix is correct based on admin router setup - just noting for future test agents.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple completed gigs (TEST_P1 Rating Flow Gig, TEST_UI Rating Gig, TEST_UI Rating Gig 2) via API for testing. Lead (testlead) and Freelancer (testfreelancer) both verified via admin bulk-action /api/admin/users/bulk-action.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and working. Backend: 21/21 pass. Frontend: all flows verified. Key notes: (1) Admin bulk-action URL is /api/admin/users/bulk-action. (2) To create test data for ratings: need verified users, create gig, invite, accept, handover. (3) testlead and testfreelancer are now verified users. (4) Rating modal sliders: use JS evaluate with React nativeInputValueSetter to trigger onChange. (5) Privacy: lead_notes are keyed by (lead_id, freelancer_id) so freelancer cannot see lead's notes. (6) MOCKED: WhatsApp, Email (Resend), Google Calendar OAuth.

flows_verified.dashboard_pending_ratings_banner: ✅ Banner shows with correct count when completed gigs have unrated crew
flows_verified.rate_now_button: ✅ Opens rating modal for specific gig
flows_verified.rating_modal_sliders: ✅ All 3 sliders (Punctuality, Gear Handling, Teamwork) present with 1-5 range
flows_verified.private_note_in_modal: ✅ Optional textarea in modal saved as private note on submission
flows_verified.rating_submission: ✅ API call succeeds, toast shown, modal closes
flows_verified.pending_list_removal: ✅ Gig removed from pending list after all crew rated
flows_verified.profile_private_notes_section: ✅ Visible when viewing another user's profile
flows_verified.save_note: ✅ PUT /api/notes/{id} called, toast 'Note saved privately!' shown
flows_verified.delete_note_btn_after_save: ✅ Delete button appears after saving note (noteExists=true)
flows_verified.delete_note: ✅ DELETE /api/notes/{id} called, note cleared, delete btn hidden
flows_verified.notes_hidden_on_own_profile: ✅ Private Notes section NOT shown when isOwn=true
flows_verified.notes_privacy_other_user: ✅ Freelancer cannot see lead's private notes about them (different JWT context)
